title: God Mode Mod!
description: A Giant, Fun, and Unique Experience!
body:
THANK YOU FOR 50K+ DOWNLOADS, THAT IS INSANE

Mod Showcase: https://youtu.be/R2RAOd6tNEU

VERSIONS SUPPORTED:

1.15.2 - OLD BETA VERSIONS, NO LONGER BEING CONTINUED

1.16.5 - STABLE BUT NOT SUPPORTED AND NOT CURRENTLY BEING CONTINUED

1.17.1 - STABLE BUT NOT SUPPORTED AND NOT CURRENTLY BEING CONTINUED

1.18.2 - Rarely updated although not all features are included

1.19.2 -  Still updated although not all features are included

1.19.4 - Still updated, may be missing some smaller features

1.20.1 - Updated Regularly With Full Features And Alpha Versions

STATUS OF MOD: (STABLE/IN DEV)




BEFORE CONTINUING:
Please keep in mind that I spend a lot of time making these mods and I would really like to make a small profit, if you are feeling generous please consider donation through patreon!
Also join my discord server if you would like help or would like to help us build an active community!

**Donate: https://www.patreon.com/herculuke**

**My Community - https://discord.gg/pUcJHrxNKF**


For Content Creators
You have full permission to record videos, post blogs, and play this pack while you do not distribute it as your own.

(If you do make a video about the pack. Please post it in the comments of the project so I can add it to the project description.)

My Project Has Been Played Over And Tested For Over 5 Years!!!
I will continue to Update About Once A Month!

[FOR A WIKI: CLICK HERE AND CHECK OUT THE GOD MODE MOD PAGE](https://herculuke.fandom.com/wiki/God_Mode_Mod!) (or use the in-game wiki system)



**This Mod Contains New Ores Such As:**

Copper (Overworld) (NOT AVALIABLE IN ANY VERSION PAST THE ANTI-LAG VERSION)

Deus (Overworld)

Arium (Oxygon)

Firium (Fire Kingdom)

Mythium (Overworld)

Lush (Overworld)

Ocean (Atlantia)

Letric (Oxygon)

Electric (Craft Electric Forge With Three Ocean, Three Letric, And One Deus.) (Use Forge With Letric And Ocean)

Dark Matter (Underworld, A Block Of This Stuff Makes Concentrated Darkness)



**New Structures:**

Lush Court (Spawns In Verdure Dimension IN 2.4 AND OLDER) (IN 2.5 AND OLDER SPAWNS IN OVERWORLD)

Cloud Castle (Spawns In Airland Biome)

Underworld Temple (Spawns In Dimension Underworld)

Air Temple (Spawns In Oxygon Dimension)

Glowing Core (Spawns Underground In Overworld)

Ice Ruins (On Surface In Ice Kingdom)

Fire Temple (On The Surface In The Fire Kingdom)

Cloud Castle (Special Biome In The Overworld)



**New Dimensions:**

~~Verdure (Build Portal With Oak Leaves And Use Three Emerald Blocks To Make Portal Igniter)  (NOT AVALIABLE PAST 2.4)~~

Oxygon (Build Portal With White Wool And Make The Igniter With Three White Wool)

~~Potato (VERY LAGGY DIMENSION, Portal Made With Potato Blocks And Use Three Potato Blocks To Make The Igniter) (NOT AVALIABLE IN ANY VERSION PAST THE ANTI-LAG VERSION)~~

Underworld (Filled With The Undead, Make Portal With Coal Blocks And Ignite With Key To The Underworld)

Atlantia (Build Portal With Sandstone And Use Mythium And Water Buckets To Make Igniter)

Ice Kingdom (Build Portal With Stone Bricks And Make The Igniter With 4 Deus)

Fire Kindom (Unlock Key Recipe By Finding Deus Make The Portal With Nether Bricks)



**New Mobs:**

UNDER DEVELOPMENT

KILLER PIG (FULL BOSSFIGHT, USE SUMMONING TABLE)



**New Weapons And Tools:**

AT LEAST One For Every Modded Ore 

Most Of Them Have Special Abilities Unique To The Substance

Includes Rings And Runes!



**New Armor:**

AT LEAST One For Every Modded Ore 

Most Of Them Have Special Abilities Unique To The Substance



**SHOP BLOCK:**

Make With 4 Arium Around One Deus, Its GUI Explains Itself, use it to exchange materials for better ones.



~~CURSED UPDATE: NOTE: (NOT AVALIABLE IN ANY VERSION PAST THE ANTI-LAG VERSION)
Build A Nether-Like Portal Out Of Yellow Stained Glass And Then Surround A God Potato With Four Ice Gems To Make The Portal Opener!
Travel Into The Cursed Dimension, Mine For Cursed Ore And Make Cursed Items!
Even Ride A New Mob - The Cursed Robot!~~




**RECCOMENDED COMPANION MODS:**

JEI

Immersive Caves

Here be no dragons


Like The God Mode Mod? If So Make Sure To Try Out My Other Mods Like Immersive Caves While I Work On The Next Update!
